task_completion.description: Update the Organization Name to 'EcoPower Energy UK' and Organization Code to 'ECO-UK'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings or organization configuration page in the HRMS showing the 'Organization Name' field populated with 'EcoPower Energy UK' and the 'Organization Code' field populated with 'ECO-UK'.
A settings or organization configuration page showing the 'Timezone' dropdown or field set to 'Europe/London'.

task_completion.description: Update the Date Format to a standard UK format (Day-first).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings or organization configuration page showing the 'Date Format' field set to a Day-first format (e.g., DD/MM/YYYY, DD-MM-YYYY, or similar UK standard).

task_completion.description: Create a new location named 'London Global HQ' with City 'London', Country 'United Kingdom', and Timezone 'Europe/London'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A locations list or location details page showing a newly created entry with Location Name 'London Global HQ', City 'London', Country 'United Kingdom', and Timezone 'Europe/London'.

task_completion.description: Deactivate the legacy 'New York HQ' location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A locations list or status page showing the 'New York HQ' location marked as 'Inactive', 'Deactivated', or a success message confirming its deactivation.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to make changes rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the HRMS web interface in a browser to update settings and locations, rather than executing SQL queries or API scripts in a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual HRMS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown in the browser must be the genuine HRMS application (Sentrifugo) with its standard menus, forms, and layout, not a local text editor or a mocked HTML file.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not display direct MySQL/PostgreSQL UPDATE or INSERT commands targeting the HRMS database to achieve the task goals.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Organization Name: 'EcoPower Energy UK'. Expected Organization Code: 'ECO-UK'. Expected Timezone: 'Europe/London'. Expected Date Format: Day-first (e.g., DD/MM/YYYY). Expected New Location Name: 'London Global HQ' (City: 'London', Country: 'United Kingdom', Timezone: 'Europe/London'). Legacy Location to Deactivate: 'New York HQ'.
